name: Quick Score
description: Manually triggered — gives a fast 12-category score of the current song without full critique report

then.prompt: Quick-score the currently open song file. Score all 12 categories (1-10): Hook, Lyrics, Prosody, Arc, Structure, Originality, Singability, Commercial, Genre, Arrangement, Voice/Accent, Emotional Intelligence. For each: one score + one sentence. Calculate composite. Identify the strongest line. Flag the single biggest issue with a suggested fix. Keep the output concise — no full critique report needed.
